commit_scope: Spec for Form root-word translation: the smallest honest band answering 'can Form carry meaning?' the way the lift bands answered 'can Form carry computation?'. Translation by structural mapping through shared meaning cells — the meaning identity is the i18n corpus key-path cell, surfaces are doors, unknown realizes to nothing (the same third state intrinsic casting uses), ambiguity returns sense lists as data, round-trip + coverage counts are asserted evidence, three-way proof via validate.sh. Real corpus (web/messages en/de/es/id, ~2300 keys per locale) over invented vocabulary.

local_validation.summary: Spec quality gate passes (frontmatter source map, requirements, done_when, test, constraints, gaps with follow-ups, files, acceptance referencing tests/). Indexes regenerated. Spec-only commit: no runtime changes; the implementation slice follows the spec's task card.

observed_delta.session_ideas: boundaries-carry-proof c2bdf83c-a590-4882-b692-a2a7244103cc; nutrient-ledger-molecular-cells 111df93f-1f99-459f-bf7e-57bf2035a077 (dependency-ordered after this slice)

known_limitations.limitation: Spec only — root-word-translation.fk and its band do not exist yet.
known_limitations.follow_up: Implementation slice per the spec task card: word/meaning cell interning from the i18n corpus, structural translation walk, three-way band.

known_limitations.limitation: The corpus speaks UI register; vocabulary breadth grows with the corpus, not this spec.
known_limitations.follow_up: A concepts section in web/messages/*.json lifts coverage without code changes (named in tests/concept-i18n-band.fk).

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: None at runtime — the spec names the destination for the human-language translation axis and its first proof band.

phase_gate.gate: Spec named with real-corpus ground, honesty lanes (nothing on unknown, ambiguity as data), and three-way proof shape
phase_gate.next: Implement root-word-translation.fk + band per the task card
